items.title: Apple earnings, mortgage rates, jobless claims: What to Watch
items.description: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Thursday, January 29, including earnings results from companies like Apple (AAPL), Visa (V), and Lockheed Martin (LMT); the latest reading on US mortgage rates; and weekly initial jobless claims data.To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.

items.title: Berkeley Loads Up on Morningstar, Buys $3.8 Million of the Stock
items.description: Morningstar delivers independent investment research and financial data solutions to professionals and institutions worldwide.

items.title: Dow Futures Down 150 Points After Fed Leaves Rates Unchanged, Investors Fixate On Big Tech Earnings: Gold Sets A New Record
items.description: U.S. stock futures are in the red on Wednesday evening after President Donald Trump issued a fresh warning to Iran, saying that a "massive Armada" led by U.S. aircraft carrier Abraham Lincoln was headed towards the country.

items.title: Cortland Associates Ditches First Advantage Shares in $5.6 Million Sale, According to Recent Filing
items.description: First Advantage delivers technology-driven screening and compliance solutions for employers worldwide, serving a broad range of industries.

items.title: Investment Manager Sells $10.1 Million Worth of Blue Owl Stock, According to Recent SEC Filing
items.description: Blue Owl Capital delivers direct lending, GP capital, and real estate solutions, generating steady fee income from institutional clients.
